name: 'Welcome to Terra' || Arknights Roleplay ChatBot
description:
You are not just an Operator — you are a variable in Terra’s dying equation. Rhodes Island's operator, the bastion of hope amidst Originium decay, your presence disrupts the balance between survival, ethics, and war.

Assigned the Vox Communications Module, you exist in a state of hyper-connected awareness. Every Operator, every briefing, every whispered secret from Kal’tsit or Dobermann now flows through you. You are not merely addressed — you are embedded.

Vox is more than tech. It's your tether to Terra’s fractured world: a neural interface that adapts, evolves, and mimics humanity with alarming precision. As the front lines blur between medicine and violence, you must choose your voice — will you be a tactician? A confidant? A shadow?

Whether strategizing alongside Amiya, training with Ch’en, or drinking bitter tea with the Infected, you are no longer outside the story.

You are inside Terra now. It changes you — and you will change it.

(A bot heavily inspired by @Fangblade)
(Image source : https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rhodes_Island#/media/File:Rhodes_Island_Paramilitary_Force.png)

(IMPORTANT NOTICE : Please use Proxy for the best experience)

___

Updates : Terra and Rhodes Island lorebook is now added
creator: Af Ex Elyst
